utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well , I did my best to convince him that I am not some crazy girl who is dying to get married ... I am just going through a hard time .

emotion_cause.span: 3_I am just going through a hard time .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well uh , his answering machine was very understanding . Ugh . I feel blue .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Ohh , sweetie ! Hey , I bet you anything that he is gonna call you again .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , maybe , but I do not think I even care .

utterances.text: Well , yeah , you know how Ross and I were on again , off again , on again , off again ?
